response.original_title: Le masque de la mort rouge
response.overview: A strange epidemic had invaded the country of young Earl Prospero. With some well-chosen courtiers, he has entrenched himself in his castle in order to escape this evil. A few months later, ignoring the disease, he decides to organize a large masked ball, excusing all excess. Death, however, is indifferent to all these tricks. Based upon Edgar Allan Poe's novel.
response.title: Le masque de la mort rouge
